description: Brands with the most recent first passenger-car registration plus current count (≥5 cars). Use when user asks newest brands, Chinese EV arrivals, or latest entrants.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS first_registered_year = MIN(_foerste_registrering_aar), current_count = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret", all_time_count = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE current_count >= 5 AND brand IS NOT NULL AND first_registered_year IS NOT NULL | SORT first_registered_year DESC | LIMIT 25
